metaData.Ingredients: Water, Milk Solids, Emulsifier, Live Cultures (Streptococcus Thermophilus, Lactobacillus Bulgaricus).
metaData.Key Information:
• High in protein to build muscles.
• Great source of calcium to build strong bones.
• No sugar added. No artificial sweetener.
• Low in fat and saturated fat. A healthy diet low in saturated fat and trans fat may reduce the risk of heart disease.
• Packed with live & active cultures to help maintain a healthy digestive system.
• Thick & creamy texture, ideal for yoghurt bowls, baking and great eaten on its own!
• Naturally lower in lactose for easier digestion.
